title: Love, Thy Name Be Sorrow
actors: Hashizô Ôkawa, Michiko Saga, Ryûnosuke Tsukigata
plot: In the reign of the Emperor Suzaku (930- 946 A.D.), various mishaps happen after a strange white rainbow in appearance in the sky over Kyoto. The Emperor orders a famous astronomer, Yasunori, to consult a certain Chinese book of s...
